2.title: GET Requests
2.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.profile.http.stat.get.reqs.count),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:profile }
| fieldsAdd f5:profile_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:profile)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

3.title: POST Requests
3.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.f5.bigip.profile.http.stat.post.reqs.count),
  by: { dt.entity.f5:profile }
| fieldsAdd f5:profile_name = entityName(dt.entity.f5:profile)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20
